'''Bel Att''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] who served as a member of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and an enforcer for the crimelord [[Sprax]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Limna Yith]] while trying to protect valuable Black Sun data during a dispute on the mining colony [[Yen-2]].

{{Char-stub}}
